Invoice Approval Process — Rapid Freight Solutions

The Finance Assistant receives supplier invoices by email and checks each invoice
against the delivery records before approving payment.

Payments over R5,000 require Finance Manager approval.
Payments over R50,000 require Director sign-off.

If a delivery record cannot be matched to the invoice, the invoice must be flagged
and held until the discrepancy is resolved.

The Operations team is responsible for maintaining delivery records.
The Finance Manager reviews all flagged invoices weekly.
